name: io.github.bch1212/queryshield
description: Secure SQL proxy for AI agents. Translates NL → SQL via Claude, validates at the AST level (no DDL/DML), enforces per-agent row-level security, and audit-logs every query.

env.name: QUERYSHIELD_API_KEY
env.description: Agent API key issued by QueryShield. See https://queryshield.dev for provisioning.

env.name: QUERYSHIELD_BASE_URL
env.description: Override the default https://api.queryshield.dev for self-hosted deploys.

tools.name: query_database
tools.description: Run a natural-language question against a registered database.

tools.name: query_database_sql
tools.description: Run a structured SELECT against a registered database (no LLM step).

tools.name: get_audit_log
tools.description: Return recent audit entries for the calling agent.
